product_overview: An academic alumni portal that lets graduates and employers sign in, manage profiles and job postings, and support alumni services such as document requests, job applications, events, and public verification. It also provides public informational pages and role-based dashboards for graduates, employers, and administrators.
core_goals: Allow graduates to register, sign in, and access their dashboard
Allow employers to register, sign in, and manage job-related activities
Enable graduates to request academic documents
Enable graduates to browse and apply for jobs
Provide public access to alumni information, contact details, and document verification
Support role-based dashboards for graduates, employers, and administrators

features.name: Graduate Registration & Login
features.description: Lets graduates create an account and sign in to access their graduate workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter registration details -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation or be redirected to the graduate sign-in flow
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the graduate dashboard

features.name: Employer Registration & Login
features.description: Lets employers create an account and sign in to access employer tools.
user_flows: Navigate to /employers/register -> Enter registration details -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation or be redirected to the employer sign-in flow
Navigate to /employers/login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the employer dashboard

features.name: Graduate Dashboard
features.description: Provides graduates with a central place to view their account overview and access key graduate services.
user_flows: Navigate to /graduate/dashboard -> See the graduate overview and available actions -> Choose a service to continue to the relevant graduate area

features.name: Graduate Profile Management
features.description: Allows graduates to view and update their profile and personal information.
user_flows: Navigate to /graduate/profile -> Review profile details -> Edit personal information -> Save changes -> See the updated profile information

features.name: Document Request
features.description: Allows graduates to request academic documents such as transcripts or certificates.
user_flows: Navigate to /graduate/documents -> Open the document request flow -> Enter document type and reason -> Submit the request -> See the request recorded in the documents area

features.name: Job Application
features.description: Allows graduates to browse active job listings and apply for a selected role.
user_flows: Navigate to /graduate/jobs -> Browse the job listings -> Open a job listing -> Review the job details -> Submit a job application -> See the application action completed

features.name: Graduate Events Registration
features.description: Allows graduates to view and register for alumni events.
user_flows: Navigate to /graduate/events -> Browse available events -> Select an event -> Register for the event -> See the registration reflected in the events area

features.name: Employer Job Management
features.description: Allows employers to manage job postings from their dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /employer/dashboard -> Open job management -> Create or update a job posting -> Save the job posting -> See the posting listed in the employer jobs area
Navigate to /employer/jobs -> Review the job postings list -> Select a posting to manage -> Update the posting details -> Save changes -> See the updated posting in the list

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides administrators with a summary view of portal activity and management metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Review the dashboard summary -> Inspect activity metrics and management sections

features.name: Public Document Verification
features.description: Lets visitors search for and verify public documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify -> Enter verification details -> Submit the search -> See the verification result

features.name: Public Alumni Information and Contact
features.description: Provides public informational pages about the alumni service and ways to contact the team.
user_flows: Navigate to /alumni/about -> Read the alumni information page
Navigate to /alumni/contact -> Review contact information -> Send a contact inquiry

features.name: Public Home and Latest Jobs
features.description: Shows the public landing page and highlights the latest job opportunities.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the landing page and latest jobs -> Open a public job opportunity or continue to a sign-in or registration path

routes.description: Welcome and landing page with latest jobs
Graduate profile view and edit page

user_interactions: Enter email graduate@example.com and password grad123

features.name: Employer Registration & Login

user_interactions: Enter email employer@example.com and password emp123
